chunks.title: 8_Grid Model
chunks.text: Before understanding the properties of the grid, we need to understand the model of the grid and its terms. First of all, whenever our grid layout is created, it is created in 2D form with the help of lines. We have some row lines like line number 1, line number 2, line number 3, line number 4. And similarly, we have column lines.

chunks.title: 8_Grid Model
chunks.text: And similarly, we have column lines. Column line number 1, line number 2, line number 3, line number 4. These are the lines that are horizontally going. We call them row lines and the lines that are vertically going, we call them column lines.

full_text: Before understanding the properties of the grid, we need to understand the model of the grid and its terms. First of all, whenever our grid layout is created, it is created in 2D form with the help of lines. We have some row lines like line number 1, line number 2, line number 3, line number 4. And similarly, we have column lines. Column line number 1, line number 2, line number 3, line number 4. These are the lines that are horizontally going. We call them row lines and the lines that are vertically going, we call them column lines. Our line number starts with 1, i.e. 1, 2, 3, 4, 5. And when these row lines and column lines are met with each other, we have a box like this. We call this box as grid cell. So, when we are talking about grid cell, it means that we are talking about a box in our grid layout. So, there are three terms in which we should know what grid lines are. Apart from that, what is our grid cell? Cell i.e. a box. So, if we talk about any box in this, it will be our cell. And third we should know what grid track is. Track is the distance between two lines. So, in my space between line number 1 & line number 2, we call it grid track, it is our Track. If I talk about this space, there is another track between line number 3 & line number 4, if we talk about that space, then the track is the between line number 2 & 9, if we talk about a track between line number 1 & 2, then the track will be this one. If we talk about three & four between to track the track, then our track will be this. So, whenever we talk of a space between two lines, then we call it as Track. Let's visualize it a little. The lines in the grid are called Incon grid lines. In grid, in lines, which are empty boxes, we call it cell. It is not necessary that it is empty box. Our items are placed in these cells. If we have made this grid, then the first item will be placed here, second item will be placed here, third item will be placed here. Or depending upon what we have laid out, but our items are always placed in cell. And if we talk about the space in the grid lines, the space between the two lines is called grid track. So, we should know the differences between the three. In case we are told that we have to place the element in the grid cell, or what is the length of the track in the grid track, how to design the layout. Now, what we will do is, we have done the display grid here. To see the same thing, we will inspect here. As soon as we inspect, we will go to the container. Which container? My black container. We will see small purple lines on it. Let's remove the responsiveness here. So, the purple lines that we are showing are basically the lines of our grid. For our grid, we have not told the number of lines, the number of columns, the information of the track. By default, all the items, i.e. my divs, are coming into each individual row. i.e. this layout of by default is created. With the help of these purple lines, we have 5-6 grid lines. All these by defaults are here. We have not set them from anywhere. But here, we have started to see the grid layout little by little. So, whenever we have to track the grid layout, like how our lines are going, how our cells are forming, where our element is placed, we can inspect and track these purple lines on the screen.
